bot_token: Bot Token // Telegram Bot API token obtained from @BotFather
language: Language // Bot interface language: ru or en
database.provider: Provider // Database provider: local or remote (default: local). Leave empty to auto-detect (remote if url and auth_token are set, otherwise local)
database.path: Database Path // File path to the local SQLite database
database.url: Connection URL // Remote database connection URL (for the remote provider)
database.auth_token: Auth Token // Authentication token for remote database providers
reactions.suspicious_message: Suspicious Message // Emoji reaction for suspicious messages (default: 🤔)
reactions.bad_message: Bad Message // Emoji reaction for confirmed bad messages (default: 🍌)
reactions.content_filter: Content Filter // Emoji reaction when content filter is triggered (default: 🥴)
reactions.creative_reply_limit: Creative Reply Limit // Emoji reaction when creative reply limit is reached (default: 🥱)
reactions.extracting_link: Extracting Link // Emoji reaction while extracting link content (default: ✍)
reactions.extract_link_failed: Extract Link Failed // Emoji reaction when link extraction fails (default: 🌚)
reactions.user_muted: User Muted // Emoji reaction when a user is muted (default: 🤮)
reactions.report_acknowledged: Report Acknowledged // Emoji reaction when report is acknowledged (default: 👌)
reactions.creative_reply_error: Creative Reply Error // Emoji reaction when creative reply generation fails (default: 😐)
admin.chat_id: Admin Chat ID // Telegram chat ID for admin notifications
admin.reply_message_ids: Reply Message IDs // Message IDs in admin chat to reply to (for topic-based chats)
admin.super_admin_user_id: Super Admin User ID // Primary super admin's Telegram user ID for direct commands
admin.notify_super_admin: Notify Super-Admin // Also send moderation notifications (with action keyboard) to super-admin's DM
admin.notify_startup: Notify on Startup // DM the super-admin when the bot starts or restarts, and when the remote DB connection drops or recovers
admin.whitelist_user_ids: Whitelist User IDs // User IDs that bypass content filters and have admin access
moderation.chat_id: Moderation Chat IDs // Telegram chat IDs to moderate (single or array)
moderation.excluded_topics: Excluded Topics // (chat, topic) pairs excluded from AI content analysis. Use 'Any topic' for the wildcard, 'Main only' for the chat's main area, or a specific forum thread id.
moderation.mute_across_all_chats: Mute Across All Chats // When muting a user, also mute in all other moderation chats
message_deletion.included_topics: Included Topics // (chat, topic) pairs where messages are eligible for auto-deletion. Empty = every moderation chat / any topic. Use 'Main only' to limit to the main area.
message_deletion.excluded_topics: Excluded Topics // (chat, topic) pairs that override Included Topics - messages here are never auto-deleted.
message_deletion.excluded_user_ids: Excluded User IDs // User IDs whose messages are never deleted
message_deletion.chat_deletion_retention: Retention Hours // Delete messages older than this many hours (default: 3)
message_deletion.cleanup_interval_hours: Cleanup Interval Hours // How often to run the deletion cleanup (default: 3)
database_cleanup.cleanup_interval_hours: Cleanup Interval Hours // How often to run database cleanup in hours (0 = disabled, default: 24)
database_cleanup.message_retention_hours: Message Retention Hours // Keep message records for this many hours (default: 168 = 7 days)
database_cleanup.warning_retention_hours: Warning Retention Hours // Keep warning records for this many hours (default: 168)
database_cleanup.action_retention_hours: Action Retention Hours // Keep action log records for this many hours (default: 168)
database_cleanup.preserve_warned_muted_m: Preserve Warned/Muted Messages // Keep messages that triggered a warning or an active mute until it is cleared or expires (default: off)
scheduled_events.missed_event_max_delay_: Missed Event Max Delay // Maximum delay in minutes to still fire a missed scheduled event after bot restart (default: 120)
scheduled_events.webhook_mode: Webhook Mode // When enabled, scheduled events run only when triggered via webhook (not automatically)
scheduled_events.webhook_path: Webhook Path // URL path for the scheduled events webhook trigger endpoint (default: /trigger-events)
scheduled_events.lock_timeout_minutes: Lock Timeout // Minutes before a stale scheduled event lock is considered expired and can be reclaimed (default: 15)
debug.debug_telegram: Debug Telegram // Log detailed Telegram communication (updates, commands, callbacks)
debug.debug_external_apis: Debug External APIs // Log all external API requests and responses
debug.debug_api_errors: Debug API Errors // Log only failed API requests with error codes and trimmed response body
debug.trace_topics: Trace Topics // TRACE-log forum-topic fields (message_thread_id, reply_to) on inbound updates and outbound posts; use after deploy to verify topic handling
debug.dump_moderation_messages: Dump Moderation Messages // Dump all moderation messages to files
debug.dump_admin_messages: Dump Admin Messages // Dump all admin messages to files
debug.message_dump_path: Message Dump Path // Directory path for message dump files (default: ./logs)
debug.send_to_super_admin: Send Debug to Super-Admin // Send enabled debug logs (API errors, chat dumps, etc.) to super-admin Telegram user
server.listen_addr: Listen Address // Address to listen on for HTTP server (default: 0.0.0.0)
server.listen_port: Listen Port // Port to listen on for HTTP server (default: 8080)
server.certificate_path: Certificate Path // Path to TLS certificate file for self-signed certificates
webhook.enabled: Enabled // Use webhook mode instead of long-polling
webhook.secret_token: Secret Token // Secret token for webhook validation
webhook.url: URL // Public HTTPS URL of the webhook
web_ui.enabled: Enabled // Enable the web administration panel
web_ui.path_prefix: Path Prefix // URL path prefix for the web UI (default: /admin)
web_ui.password: Password // Password for web UI authentication. Plaintext is accepted in YAML; DB-backed config stores it as hashed:pbkdf2-sha256:...
web_ui.otp_enabled: OTP Enabled // Enable one-time password (TOTP) for web UI login (default: true)
ai.enabled: AI Enabled // Enable AI-powered features (content moderation, summaries, etc.)
ai.chat_rules: Chat Rules // Chat rules text used in AI prompts for content moderation
ai.track_reactions: Track Reactions // Store per-message emoji reactions and feed them into AI context for summaries, creative replies and user profiles. Aggregate counts work in any chat; per-user events also need the bot to be a chat admin
ai.warning_mute: Warning Mute Text // Mute info text added to the warning prompt via {{mute_info}} placeholder if user is muted
ai.content_moderation.skip_admin_users: Skip Admin Users // Skip content moderation for admin users
ai.content_moderation.complaint_manual_m: Manual Moderation On Complaint // When a user reports a message (reply + @bot mention) the bot first re-runs AI moderation across every configured model and acts automatically if any flags it. If every model clears it: ON (default) posts the admin decision card for manual review; OFF ends the complaint silently.
ai.content_moderation.default_mute_minut: Auto-Mute Duration (min) // Duration applied by the 'mute' auto-moderation action (default: 60, 0 = forever)
ai.content_moderation.vision_enabled: Vision Enabled // Enable Azure Vision API for image analysis
ai.content_moderation.vision_endpoint: Vision Endpoint // Azure Vision API endpoint URL
ai.content_moderation.vision_api_key: Vision API Key // API key for Azure Vision
ai.content_moderation.content_safety_ena: Content Safety Enabled // Enable Azure Content Safety API
ai.content_moderation.content_safety_end: Content Safety Endpoint // Azure Content Safety API endpoint URL
ai.content_moderation.content_safety_api: Content Safety API Key // API key for Azure Content Safety
ai.content_moderation.new_user_profile_c: New Member Profile Check // On a new user's first message, screen their whole public profile (name, bio, profile photo, and linked personal channel name/description/photo) with AI and image analysis (Content Safety → Vision → OCR.space), adding a notice to their profile if flagged. Works without Content Safety.
ai.content_moderation.new_user_window_ho: New-User Window (hours) // How long after a user's first observed message they count as 'new'. New users get a marker in the moderation context and trigger the {{new_user_rules}} placeholder (default: 24).
ai.content_moderation.new_user_rules: New-User Rules // Extra rules text injected into the {{new_user_rules}} moderation-prompt placeholder, only for messages from new users (see New-User Window). Empty = the placeholder expands to nothing.
ai.content_moderation.reply_context_max_: Reply Context Max Chars // Max length (in characters) of the quoted 'in reply to' text injected into the moderation {{reply_to}} placeholder. Longer quotes are truncated with an ellipsis (never splits a character). 0 = no limit (default: 500).
ai.content_moderation.ocrspace_enabled: OCR.space Enabled // Enable the OCR.space cloud API (https://ocr.space/ocrapi) for text extraction from images
ai.content_moderation.ocrspace_api_key: OCR.space API Key // API key for OCR.space (free tier available; test key: helloworld)
ai.content_moderation.ocrspace_url: OCR.space URL // OCR.space endpoint, default https://api.ocr.space/parse/image
ai.content_moderation.ocrspace_language: OCR.space Language // 3-letter language code (e.g. eng, rus, cze); engines 2/3 also accept 'auto'
ai.content_moderation.ocrspace_engine: OCR.space Engine // OCR engine: 1 (default), 2 (best all-round, memes/noisy backgrounds), 3 (highest accuracy, handwriting, 200+ languages)
ai.creative_replies.enabled: Enabled // Enable AI creative replies to user messages
ai.creative_replies.use_full_model: Use Full Model // Use full model instead of light for creative replies
ai.creative_replies.max_messages: Max Messages // Max creative replies per time window (default: 3)
ai.creative_replies.time_window: Time Window (hours) // Time window in hours for rate limiting (default: 3)
ai.creative_replies.included_topics: Included Topics // (chat, topic) pairs where creative replies are allowed. Empty = every moderation chat / any topic. Use 'Any topic' to enable a whole chat, or 'Main only' for the main area.
ai.creative_replies.excluded_topics: Excluded Topics // (chat, topic) pairs where creative replies are suppressed even when otherwise included.
ai.creative_replies.follow_up_only_same_: Follow-up Only Same User // Only reply creatively to the same user in a follow-up
ai.creative_replies.reply_chain_depth: Reply Chain Depth // Max messages to follow up the reply chain for dialog history context (default: 5)
ai.creative_replies.reply_chain_max_age_: Reply Chain Max Age (hours) // Stop walking the reply chain once a message is older than this many hours (default: 6)
ai.creative_replies.reply_chain_adjacent: Reply Chain Adjacent Window // Pick up other messages from chain participants whose message ID lies within this many slots around chain messages (0 = disabled). Age is bounded by reply_chain_max_age_hours.
ai.morning_greeting.use_ai: Use AI // Use AI to generate greeting (if disabled, shows holidays, events and weather only)
ai.morning_greeting.use_full_model: Use Full Model // Use full model instead of light for morning greeting
ai.morning_greeting.time: Time // Time for morning greeting (HH:MM format, default: 08:00)
ai.morning_greeting.post_to: Post To // (chat, topic) destinations for the greeting. Leave empty to post to every moderation chat in its main area.
ai.daily_summary.time: Time // Time for daily summary (HH:MM format, default: 02:00)
ai.daily_summary.use_full_model: Use Full Model // Use full model instead of light for daily summary
ai.daily_summary.post_to: Post To // (chat, topic) destinations for the summary. Empty = post to every moderation chat in its main area. Listing the same chat with several topics re-posts the same text in each topic.
ai.message_summaries.enabled: Enabled // Enable AI summaries for long messages
ai.message_summaries.use_full_model: Use Full Model // Use full model instead of light for message summaries
ai.message_summaries.light_model_thresho: Light Model Threshold // Force light model when text exceeds this character count (0 = disabled)
ai.message_summaries.min_length: Min Length // Minimum message length for summary (default: 1000)
ai.message_summaries.included_topics: Included Topics // (chat, topic) pairs where long-message summarization runs. Empty = every moderation chat / any topic.
ai.message_summaries.excluded_topics: Excluded Topics // (chat, topic) pairs excluded from message summarization.
ai.message_summaries.excluded_user_ids: Excluded User IDs // User IDs excluded from message summaries
ai.link_summaries.enabled: Enabled // Enable AI summaries for shared links
ai.link_summaries.use_full_model: Use Full Model // Use full model instead of light for link summaries and translation
ai.link_summaries.light_model_threshold: Light Model Threshold // Force light model when text exceeds this character count (0 = disabled)
ai.link_summaries.excluded_domains: Excluded Domains // Domains excluded from link summarization
ai.link_summaries.excluded_extensions: Excluded Extensions // File extensions to skip (e.g. .pdf, .doc*), supports wildcards
ai.link_summaries.excluded_user_ids: Excluded User IDs // User IDs excluded from link summarization
ai.link_summaries.included_topics: Included Topics // (chat, topic) pairs where link summaries are generated. Empty = every moderation chat / any topic.
ai.link_summaries.excluded_topics: Excluded Topics // (chat, topic) pairs excluded from link summarization.
ai.link_summaries.extractor_api_key: Extractor API Key // API key for ExtractorAPI service
ai.link_summaries.diffbot_api_key: Diffbot API Key // API key for Diffbot service
ai.link_summaries.cloudflare_account_id: Cloudflare Account ID // Cloudflare account ID for Browser Rendering API
ai.link_summaries.cloudflare_api_token: Cloudflare API Token // API token with Browser Rendering - Edit permission
ai.link_summaries.cookies: Cookies // Cookies to pass when fetching link content (e.g. name1=value1; name2=value2)
ai.link_summaries.user_agent: User Agent // Custom User-Agent header for Cloudflare Browser Rendering and manual extraction
ai.link_summaries.content_language: Content Language // Expected language of link content
ai.link_summaries.max_extracted_content_: Max Extracted Content Length // Maximum characters to extract from links (default: 4096)
ai.link_summaries.max_download_size_byte: Max Download Size (bytes) // Maximum page download size in bytes (default: 1048576 = 1 MB)
ai.link_summaries.min_summary_length: Min Summary Length // Discard AI summaries shorter than this many characters; the link is then treated as if extraction failed (0 = disabled)
ai.external_data.weather_latitude: Weather Latitude // Latitude for weather data (default: 50.088 - Prague)
ai.external_data.weather_longitude: Weather Longitude // Longitude for weather data (default: 14.4208 - Prague)
ai.external_data.holidays_country: Holidays Country // ISO country code for holidays (default: CZ)
ai.external_data.wikipedia_language: Wikipedia Language // Language for Wikipedia on-this-day events (default: cs)
ai.external_data.translate_wikipedia: Translate Wikipedia // Translate Wikipedia events via AI (default: true)
ai.content_moderation.prompt.system: Content Moderation (System) // System prompt for content moderation // message,chat_rules,user_profile,user_reputation,reply_to,new_user_rules
ai.content_moderation.prompt.user: Content Moderation (User) // User prompt for content moderation // message,chat_rules,user_profile,user_reputation,reply_to,new_user_rules
ai.content_moderation.warning_prompt.sys: Warning (System) // System prompt for warning message generation // username,user_message,chat_rules,mute_info,reputation
ai.content_moderation.warning_prompt.use: Warning (User) // User prompt for warning message generation // username,user_message,chat_rules,mute_info,reputation
ai.content_moderation.new_user_profile_p: New Member Profile Check (System) // System prompt for screening a new member's name, bio, photo and personal channel
New Member Profile Check (User) // User prompt for screening a new member's profile // profile_text
ai.creative_replies.prompt.system: Creative Reply (System) // System prompt for creative reply generation // message,context,quote
ai.creative_replies.prompt.user: Creative Reply (User) // User prompt for creative reply generation // message,context,quote
ai.morning_greeting.prompt.system: Morning Greeting (System) // System prompt for morning greeting generation // weekday,date,weather,holidays,events
ai.morning_greeting.prompt.user: Morning Greeting (User) // User prompt for morning greeting generation // weekday,date,weather,holidays,events
ai.daily_summary.prompt.system: Daily Summary (System) // System prompt for daily summary generation // messages
ai.daily_summary.prompt.user: Daily Summary (User) // User prompt for daily summary generation // messages
ai.message_summaries.prompt.system: Message Summary (System) // System prompt for message summarization // message
ai.message_summaries.prompt.user: Message Summary (User) // User prompt for message summarization // message
ai.link_summaries.prompt.system: Link Summary (System) // System prompt for link content summarization // title,url,content,truncated_suffix
ai.link_summaries.prompt.user: Link Summary (User) // User prompt for link content summarization // title,url,content,truncated_suffix
ai.translation_prompt.system: Translation (System) // System prompt for general translation (links, Wikipedia events) // text
ai.translation_prompt.user: Translation (User) // User prompt for general translation (links, Wikipedia events) // text
ai.rss.use_full_model: Use Full Model // Use full model instead of light for RSS translation and summarization
ai.rss.light_model_threshold: Light Model Threshold // Force light model when RSS text exceeds this character count (0 = disabled)
ai.rss.translation_prompt.system: RSS Translation (System) // System prompt for RSS feed translation (falls back to ai.translation_prompt) // text
ai.rss.translation_prompt.user: RSS Translation (User) // User prompt for RSS feed translation (falls back to ai.translation_prompt) // text
ai.rss.summary_prompt.system: RSS Summary (System) // System prompt for RSS feed summarization // text
ai.rss.summary_prompt.user: RSS Summary (User) // User prompt for RSS feed summarization // text
ai.user_profiles.enabled: Enabled // Enable daily AI-generated user behavior profiles
ai.user_profiles.time: Time // Time of day to run the AI user-profile update task (HH:MM)
ai.user_profiles.skip_forever_muted_user: Skip Forever-Muted Users // Don't build or update AI profiles for permanently muted users
ai.user_profiles.prompt.system: New Profile (System) // System prompt for generating new user profiles // username,messages
ai.user_profiles.prompt.user: New Profile (User) // User prompt for generating new user profiles // username,messages
ai.user_profiles.update_prompt.system: Update Profile (System) // System prompt for updating existing user profiles // username,messages,existing_profile
ai.user_profiles.update_prompt.user: Update Profile (User) // User prompt for updating existing user profiles // username,messages,existing_profile
user_profiles.enabled: Enabled // Track username/display-name history, first-seen-per-chat timestamps, and per-day message counts (independent from AI profiles)
user_profiles.disable_username_reuse_ale: Disable Username-Reuse Alerts // Suppress the admin-chat notification fired when a new user_id appears with a @username previously held by a different user_id (tracking still runs)
